title: Settings
subtitle: Changes affect the deployed stack. Affected containers restart automatically when you save.

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.subtitle: Saving restarts the in-app chat and Telegram bot.

telegram.title: Telegram bot
telegram.subtitle: Mirrors the AI chat to your phone. Saving restarts the bot.
telegram.tokenRequired: A bot token is required to enable Telegram

passwords.qbitSubtitle: Username is always admin. Saving rotates the password and restarts qBittorrent.
passwords.pyloadSubtitle: PyLoad's image always starts with default credentials. Rotate them from PyLoad's web UI if needed.
passwords.jellyfinNotSet: Admin user not set. Re-run the wizard to configure it.
passwords.jellyfinSubtitle: User: {{user}}. The change is applied directly in Jellyfin.

apiKeys.title: *arr API keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Generate a fresh API key for Sonarr, Radarr, or Prowlarr.
apiKeys.confirmMessage: {{label}} will be briefly restarted while we rotate its API key. Anything still using the old key will need to be reconfigured. Continue?

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Click any to open its web UI in your browser.

system.title: System
system.subtitle: Saving recreates the affected containers (1-2 minutes).
system.idHint: User and group IDs LinuxServer containers run as. Run <1>id -u</1> and <3>id -g</3> on Linux to find yours; <5>1000:1000</5> works on Windows/macOS.
system.confirmMessage: Saving will recreate every container in the stack so the new values take effect. This usually takes 1-2 minutes; ongoing downloads pause and resume automatically. Continue?

mediaPaths.title: Media paths
mediaPaths.subtitle: Where Sonarr, Radarr, and Jellyfin look for your library on disk. Saving recreates the affected containers.
mediaPaths.hint: Path changes don't move existing media — copy or move files yourself before saving so the containers find your library at the new location.
mediaPaths.confirmMessage: Saving rewrites the bind-mount sources in .env and recreates Sonarr / Radarr / Jellyfin / mcp-server. Existing media files at the OLD paths are NOT moved — copy or move them yourself before saving if you need to. Continue?

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: App-wide settings — saved to state.json and applied immediately.

profiles.realtimeHint: Downloads 2 s · sessions 3 s · health 5 s · services 15 s
profiles.balancedHint: Roughly 2× the realtime cadence — gentler on CPU and battery
profiles.batteryHint: Roughly 6× the realtime cadence — minimal background traffic

locales.enHint: Default — every UI string is translated.
locales.esHint: Stub — translations land in a follow-up PR; missing keys fall back to English.

libraryRefresh.label: Auto-refresh Jellyfin library
libraryRefresh.hint: Triggers a Jellyfin library scan on a schedule while the app is open. "Off" leaves Jellyfin's own scheduler in charge.

lifecycle.title: Stack lifecycle
lifecycle.subtitle: Global actions on every container.
lifecycle.confirmMessage: This will {{verb}} every container in the stack. Continue?

updates.title: Updates
updates.subtitle: Pull the latest Docker images and restart only what changed.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.wizardHint: Re-running the wizard only clears <1>state.json</1>. Docker containers keep running — to start completely fresh, also run <3>docker compose down -v</3> in the stack folder.
advanced.wizardCleared: Wizard state cleared. Restart the app to see the wizard.
advanced.importConfirmMessage: Importing overwrites your current state.json and .env with the contents of the zip. The Docker stack at the imported stackDir is NOT redeployed — open the wizard from "Re-run wizard" if you need to bring containers up at the new location. Continue?
advanced.wizardConfirmMessage: This clears the wizard state but does NOT touch the deployed stack. Next launch will run the wizard again. Continue?
